scripts.dev: cross-env TARGET_ENV=desktop NODE_ENV=development concurrently -k --prefix none "rspeedy dev" "dev-ready-rspeedy && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx rspack dev"
scripts.dev:web: cross-env TARGET_ENV=web NODE_ENV=development concurrently -k --prefix node "rspeedy dev" "cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx rspack serve"
scripts.build: rspeedy build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--import=tsx rspack build
scripts.start: cross-env TARGET_ENV=desktop npm run build && lynxtron dist/desktop
scripts.start:web: cross-env TARGET_ENV=web npm run build && npx serve dist/web
